required_preferences.fact: Pauses hosting dog playdates during business travel — arranges for a friend or dog sitter to care for his dog while away

supersedes.fact: Hosts small-group dog playdates at local park every second Saturday — never attends large dog events

required_preferences.fact: Cooks simple, quick-prep dinners at home on weeknights — avoids elaborate or time-consuming recipes while meal delivery is suspended

supersedes.fact: Relies exclusively on a meal delivery service for weeknight dinners — never cooks from scratch Monday through Friday

required_preferences.fact: Blocks two hours on Monday mornings every week for workflow review — no calls or emails allowed during this time
Attends at least one local live music show each month — avoids festivals with large crowds
Plans a weekend hiking trip at least once per quarter — never hikes in extreme heat above 95°F
Avoids all caffeine after 2pm to reduce the risk of migraines

persona: A 28-year-old customer support manager at a multinational e-commerce company
